# Plantinga

*1932 – ? · American · [Analytic Philosophy](../movements/analytic-philosophy.md)*

American analytic philosopher of religion: he gave the free-will defence its most rigorous form, showing that a good and all-powerful God can coexist without contradiction with evil, the price of a genuinely created freedom.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
